Home.title: Unlock USDC from your creator token.
Home.subtitle: Creator tokens are sold at opening. Realized USDC secures senior lenders, while junior underwriters cover capped synthetic upside.
Home.riskTitle: A capped synthetic is not guaranteed redemption.

Borrow.title: Open a capped creator-token position
Borrow.description: Quotes are based on an executed sale, never on market cap or an unverified spot price.
Borrow.sale: The Creator Token will be sold when the position opens.
Borrow.cap: Synthetic exposure is covered only up to the displayed cap.
Borrow.default: On default, the synthetic right is lost.
Borrow.contractRisk: Smart contracts and integrations can fail.
